error_signature: %error: <file>:<n>: can't find definition of variable: <ident> <n> | accum = '<n>; | ^~~~~ %error: exiting due to <n> error(s)
raw_error_example:
%Error: output/transposed_32.sv:80:9: Can't find definition of variable: 'accum'
   80 |         accum = '0;
      |         ^~~~~
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
root_cause: An undeclared variable 'accum' was used in the RTL code, likely from a cut-off or incomplete line causing a missing variable definition.
fix_rule: Ensure all variables used in always blocks are declared before use, and verify that multi-line expressions are complete without truncation. Avoid leaving partial assignments or references to non-existent variables.
fix_snippet:
`accum` not declared; remove or define it:
// Delete or comment out: accum = '0;
